title: paspalum remotum
intro: Paspalum remotum, also known as Paspalum grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paspalum remotum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Paspalum remotum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in folk remedies to promote overall well-being.
